# Letterbox Drops

> Leaflet distribution across Oxfordshire. GPS tracked, door-to-door delivery from £67 per thousand. Based in Oxford.

Letterbox Drops is a local leaflet distribution company based in Oxford, serving businesses across Oxfordshire. We deliver printed leaflets door-to-door to homes across the county, with full GPS tracked proof of delivery on every campaign.

Our main service is leaflet distribution. We also offer print and design as optional add-ons for businesses that need a complete campaign from start to finish.

## Services

- **Leaflet Distribution (Shared Campaign)**: Door-to-door leaflet delivery shared with up to two other non-competing businesses. From £67 per thousand. Minimum 5,000 leaflets. Includes live GPS tracked delivery reports.
- **Leaflet Distribution (Solus+ Campaign)**: Higher exposure delivery shared with only one other non-competing business. Rates on request. Minimum 5,000 leaflets.
- **Print**: We print your leaflets and pass them directly to our delivery team. Available in A5, A4, DL. Gloss or silk finish. Single or double-sided.
- **Design**: We design your leaflet from scratch. Professional, print-ready artwork tailored to your business.

## Coverage Area

We deliver leaflets across Oxfordshire including:
- Oxford
- Witney
- Abingdon
- Banbury
- Bicester
- Didcot
- Carterton
- Chipping Norton
- Surrounding villages across Oxfordshire

## Targeting Options

Campaigns can be targeted by:
- Postcode sector
- Radius from a location
- Specific streets
- Demographics (age, household size, average income) using Experian data

## Pricing

- Shared Campaign: from £67 per thousand leaflets
- Minimum order: 5,000 leaflets
- Turnaround: approximately 4 weeks
- Solus+ Campaign: price on application
- Print and design: price on application

## Who We Work With

We regularly deliver for local businesses including:
- Roofers and tradespeople
- Estate agents
- Gyms and fitness businesses
- Dog walkers
- Gardeners and landscapers
- Takeaways and restaurants
- Any local business looking to acquire new customers in their area

## Why Letterbox Drops

- GPS tracked delivery on every campaign — clients receive a full delivery report
- Local team based in Oxford who know Oxfordshire well
- Paid above the national living wage — motivated, reliable distributors
- Low minimum order of 5,000 leaflets — accessible for small businesses
- Maximum 3 businesses per shared round — never over-saturated
- Experian demographic data available for precise targeting

- Hours: Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm
